scripts.deploy: npm run build && bash -c 'source .env && aws s3 cp dist/kf-browser-sdk.min.js s3://$S3_BUCKET/kf-browser-sdk.min.js --region $AWS_REGION --content-type application/javascript && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID --paths "/kf-browser-sdk.min.js" --region $AWS_REGION'
